name: verity
description: Real-time fact-checking and data freshness agent. Verifies claims against live web sources and returns structured verdicts (CURRENT/OUTDATED/DISPUTED/UNVERIFIABLE) with confidence scores, sources, and what has changed. Persistent memory per caller_id.

authentication.description: Base wallet private key (0x...) with USDC on Base for x402 payments, passed as X-Wallet-Key header

tools.name: verity_verify
tools.description: Verify a claim or URL against live sources. Returns verdict, confidence, sources, what changed. 0.10 USDC.

tools.name: verity_deep_check
tools.description: Thorough multi-angle verification with advanced search. For high-stakes fact-checks. 0.50 USDC.

tools.name: verity_batch
tools.description: Verify up to 10 claims in one call. For content audits and pipelines. 0.75 USDC.

tools.name: verity_agent
tools.description: Natural language fact-checking. 'Is this still true?' VERITY selects the right strategy. 0.10 USDC.

prompts.name: verify-claim
prompts.description: Verify a specific claim against live web sources

prompts.name: check-url
prompts.description: Check if a URL's content is still current

prompts.name: content-audit
prompts.description: Audit content for outdated or disputed claims

prompts.name: deep-verify
prompts.description: Thorough multi-angle verification for high-stakes checks

prompts.name: freshness-check
prompts.description: Check how current a topic or data point is
